content:
These are small refinements, and overall, your materials are strong. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 82/100
• Resume: 86/100

⸻

Letter for Ashtan Louis Ulcena

Dear Ashtan,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. I appreciate the work you’ve put into them, and I have some feedback that I think will help strengthen your materials.

Your cover letter does a good job of highlighting your background, but one thing that could make it stronger is customization—right now, the letter is well-written but somewhat general. Try incorporating more specific details about the company and role you’re applying for. Additionally, your closing paragraph could be more compelling—adding a clear call to action (such as requesting an interview) would make a stronger impact.

Your resume is structured well and easy to read. However, one area for improvement is your objective statement—it should be more specific to the role you’re seeking. Additionally, the work experience section could be expanded with more detailed bullet points that focus on achievements rather than just listing job responsibilities. Employers want to see results, so adding quantifiable details will make your resume stand out.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 10 (chunk 10/22)
